text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Whoa! There's a rare monster figure for sale!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Mun-mun, it's so cute! I can't let this chance get
away!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And... click! It's all mine. My wallet's certainly
hurting, though...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna to have to cut back on the junk food
for a while. That means no more snacking in the
shopping district either...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Matikanetannhauser unintentionally
succeeds in her diet.
